deep_dive.title: A Noise-Robust Elicit-to-Optimize Framework for Distortion Riskmetrics via Inverse Reinforcement Learning
deep_dive.abstract: We propose a noise-robust elicit-to-optimize framework that integrates inverse reinforcement learning (IRL) and reinforcement learning (RL) for eliciting agents' risk preferences and optimizing policies under a broad class of risk objectives characterized by distortion riskmetrics. On the elicitation side, we propose an adaptive Bayesian IRL method that infers agents' latent risk objectives from their noisy observed decisions, explicitly allowing agents to take stochastic and suboptimal actions. We establish the existence of a finite set of distinguishing questions that identifies the preferred distortion riskmetric within the candidate class and prove that the convergence rate of the algorithm is of order $O(\exp(-cm+O(\sqrt{m\log m})))$ under general settings, where $c>0$ is a constant and $m$ denotes the number of algorithm iterations. On the optimization side, we develop a model-free RL algorithm for optimizing policies under conditional distortion riskmetrics. By representing the objective as an integral of the conditional cost quantile function with respect to the distortion function, the method unifies distortion-riskmetric objectives. We optimize diverse risk objectives by extending the Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) algorithm with policy, value, and quantile neural networks, where the quantile network estimates the full conditional cost quantile function and enables numerical evaluation of general risk objectives. A comprehensive empirical study demonstrates the framework's elicitation accuracy and effectiveness in complex financial environments.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: integrates inverse RL and RL for eliciting risk preferences and optimizing policies under distortion riskmetrics
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 集成逆强化学习和强化学习，在失真风险度量下推断风险偏好并优化策略
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 集成逆强化学习和强化学习，在失真风险度量下推断风险偏好并优化策略
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 集成逆强化学习和强化学习，在失真风险度量下推断风险偏好并优化策略
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Proposes a framework that uses inverse RL to infer agents' distortion risk preferences from noisy decisions, then applies RL to optimize policies, with theoretical convergence guarantees, applicable to financial risk management.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 针对智能体风险偏好的推断与策略优化问题，提出一种噪声鲁棒的框架，先通过自适应贝叶斯逆强化学习从含噪决策中推测失真风险度量，再用强化学习优化策略，并证明算法以指数速度收敛，为金融风险决策中的智能体后训练提供了理论保障与方法支持。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 针对智能体风险偏好的推断与策略优化问题，提出一种噪声鲁棒的框架，先通过自适应贝叶斯逆强化学习从含噪决策中推测失真风险度量，再用强化学习优化策略，并证明算法以指数速度收敛，为金融风险决策中的智能体后训练提供了理论保障与方法支持。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: reinforcement learning based post training of agents in finance
